title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Dedicated Freight Corridor

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Dedicated Freight Corridor
jsonLd.description:
Dedicated Freight Corridor invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Dedicated Freight Corridor:
Dedicated Freight Corridor is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dedicated Freight Corridor!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
